name: TriSalus Life Sciences, Inc.
summary: TriSalus Life Sciences, Inc. is an oncology-focused medical technology company that develops innovative drug delivery technologies for solid tumors. Its flagship product, the TriNav Infusion System, uses Pressure-Enabled Drug Delivery (PEDD) technology for interventional radiology procedures including TACE and TARE. The company also develops nelitolimod, an investigational TLR9 agonist, and the PRVI device for pancreatic tumor treatment, generating $45.2 million in TriNav revenue in 2025.
